posts.text:
Joe Kent's Courage and Conscience, and the Craven Careerism of Tulsi Gabbard

greenwald.substack.com/p/joe…

Imagine being Joe Kent: you serve 11 tours of combat, and lose your wife, in wars that this sociopathic chickenhawk demanded, only for him to then threaten you with prosecution for espionage the minute you question one of his new wars.

Mark Levin: Trump's declared face of MAGA:


Mark R. Levin (@marklevinshow)

JUST ASKING QUESTIONS ...

Did Joe Kent leak classified information to the media and Woke Reich neo-Fascists in violation of the Espionage Act?  Did any of the parties to whom he reporte

Alan Dershowitz always unintentionally clarifies what everything is about:


Julian Dorey (@juliandorey)

in what world is this not BLATANT defamation

there was absolutely NOTHING anti-semitic in @joekent16jan19’s letter





— https://nitter.net/juliandorey/status/2034006777528787050#m

I get that someone might stay in an administration to use their influence to steer it in a better direction.

But Tulsi has zero influence. She's a joke. Trump said he didn't give a shit what she thinks. And worse, she's dumping on Joe Kent for his act of conscience and courage.

Video

Pathetic, craven, desperate for power, total and permanent drain of integrity:


DNI Tulsi Gabbard (@DNIGabbard)

Donald Trump was overwhelmingly elected by the American people to be our President and Commander in Chief. As our Commander in Chief, he is responsible for determining what is and is not an imminent threat, and whether or not to take action he deems necessary to protect the safety and security of our troops, the American people and our country. 

The Office of the Director of Nationa

Neocons pretend to Love The Troops™ as long as they quietly and obediently march off to die in the wars neocons start and send other people's kids to fight.

But the minute one of them says: "wait a minute; I don't think this war is for the US," full-scale destruction ensues.


Defiant L’s (@DefiantLs)

Ben Shapiro reacts to Joe Kent resigning from his position as Director of the National Counterterrorism,

His letter is "conspiracy theory" trash.. "The idea here is that President Trump is a com

Bernie Sanders (@BernieSanders)

Joseph Kent, a top counterterrorism official under Trump, just resigned.
 
Kent and I don't agree on much, but he is right:
